entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "Jelaskan black holes simply"

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "Bantu saya fahami photosynthesis"

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "Ajari saya cara faedah berfungsi"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Belajar Apa Sahaja di inspir bagi pembelajaran foundations, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Pelajar yang ingin tahu, murid, ibu bapa, dan mereka yang belajar sendiri yang mahukan tempat yang mesra untuk bermula.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Asas

entries.source: Get examples at your level.
entries.value: Get contoh at anda tahap.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Daripada memberikan jawapan yang panjang, inspir membantu anda memilih asas yang lebih mudah, laluan yang lebih mendalam, atau contoh praktikal.

entries.source: Learn Anything
entries.value: Belajar Apa Sahaja

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Belajar Apa Sahaja Dengan Percuma Tutor AI ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Curious tentang absolutely apa sahaja? Tanya, explore, dan go deeper pada anda pace. Anda buddy menjadikan ideas praktikal, memorable, dan mudah untuk bina di. Try: "Jelaskan bagaimana stock market actually works."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Belajar Apa Sahaja Dengan Percuma Tutor AI: praktikal panduan

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question.
entries.value: Leave dengan berguna seterusnya soalan.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Start the live mode at Learn Anything. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Socratic Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Belajar Apa Sahaja. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Arahan Sokratik. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Understand the core idea.
entries.value: Fahami core idea.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Belajar Apa Sahaja apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
